author: highmagician
description: Renders task markers using any character as a visual checkbox. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: HMage
manifest.description: Renders task markers using any character as a visual checkbox.
manifest.name: Any Task

name: Any Task

releases.author: highmagician
releases.description:
# Initial Release

## Added
- **Dynamic task rendering** — Support for rendering any character within task markers (e.g., `[/]`, `[>]`, `[!]`, `[-]`) as visual checkboxes.
- **Theme preservation** — Built-in compatibility to maintain and support the custom task styling from popular community themes.
- **Reactive styling** — Automatically detects theme changes to ensure visual consistency across the vault.

## Technical
- **Optimized bundle** — Minified production build using `esbuild` for high performance and minimal footprint.
- **Platform stability** — Full support for Obsidian v1.11.7+ or earlier down to v1.0.0 on both desktop and mobile.
- **Type safety** — Written in TypeScript for long-term maintainability and reliability.
